# TravelCheckpoint

TravelCheckpoint is Gary Cakir's personal mobile-first flight and hotel search PWA. It is not a public product and has no open registration.

## What it does

- Natural-language flight search ("Dubai to London, business, next week")
- Parallel fan-out across: Seats.aero award seats (12 loyalty programs), Google Flights (self-hosted scraper + SerpAPI fallback), Duffel bookable offers, Kiwi creative routes, Skiplagged hidden-city fares, LiteAPI hotel rates, rooms.aero hotel points
- Currency conversion, visa requirement lookup, hidden-gem destination suggestions
- Price alert tracking with Telegram notifications
- PWA — installable on Android and iOS

## Tech stack

Next.js 16 App Router, TypeScript, deployed on Vercel. No database — user data (history, preferences, saved searches) lives in localStorage.

## Data sources

- Seats.aero: award seat availability across 12 frequent-flyer programs
- SerpAPI: Google Flights fallback for cash prices
- Duffel: bookable airline offers
- LiteAPI: hotel rates (sandbox in current deployment)
- fawazahmed0 CDN: currency exchange rates
- Groq / Llama 3.3 70B: chat assistant with Gemini 2.0 Flash fallback

## Scope

Personal tool for one user (Gary Cakir, based in Dubai). Not open to the public.
